_policy: Known CodeQL findings, allowlisted per the repo's fail-on-NEW gate policy (same shape as the axe allowlists, #220). Each entry matches ruleId + file uri (line numbers drift, deliberately not matched). Every entry MUST carry a tracking issue; removing the entry once fixed is that issue's DoD — the gate then guards the fix forever. Adding an entry requires triage, never convenience. KNOWN BLIND SPOT: the ruleId+uri fingerprint means a genuinely NEW instance of an allowlisted rule IN THE SAME FILE is also swallowed until that file's entry is removed — bounded to the 4 tracked files, self-healing as #323/#324 land; deliberate trade vs line-drift false-reds.

known.note: Potential <style injection via single-pass sanitization in the CSS purge build integration — REAL product concern, security-labeled.
